parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: Unique ID for TPP

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Encrypted access token

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: Correlation ID passed by the requesting system

parameters.name: journeyId
parameters.description: Global transaction Id

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: 2-character iso code for preferred language.  If empty the default will be English

parameters.name: originSourceId
parameters.description: ID of the source system invoking

parameters.name: originChannelId
parameters.description: ID of the channel from which the invocation occurred

parameters.name: originDeptId
parameters.description: ID of the department from which the invocation occurred

parameters.name: originUserId
parameters.description: User ID of the requester (as per LDAP)

parameters.name: originEmployeeId
parameters.description: Employee ID of the requester (as per employee HR record)

parameters.name: originTerminalId
parameters.description: Terminal ID of the requester

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: Subscription Id of TPP

parameters.name: timeStamp
parameters.description: The time stamp when the request was sent to system

parameters.name: tppId
parameters.description: Third party Provide ( TPP ) ID

parameters.name: customerIP
parameters.description: The PSU's IP address if the PSU is currently logged in with the TPP

parameters.name: customerSessionId
parameters.description: The PSU’s Session Identifier with the TPP

parameters.name: customerDevice
parameters.description: The PSU’s Web Browser Agent or Device Type (Whatever is available from Platform, OS Version, Model) if this is a Mobile App

parameters.name: loginTimeStamp
parameters.description: The time of PSU’s last login with the TPP related to the Session Id provided above

transactionTime.description: Needed only in case of two factor authentication. Time as received in the create payment message

authCode.description: Subscriber has to provide Auth code in case of two factor authentication. For example OTP entered by Subscriber on the TPP screen.

code.description: Allowed values CPLT | RJCT | PDNG | AUTH |

items.description:
It will be set to one of the following depending on the status:

COMPLETED: The transaction has passed all validations and was successfully posted in bank systems.

REJECTED: The transaction was rejected when attempting to post it on the banks systems.Please check error code

PENDING: Processing Pending. Please, check your Transaction Status Page on  Bank portal for more information.

AUTHORISATION: The transaction has been accepted by the bank but needs to be authorized by another user(s) .

refNumber.description: A 9 digit number which the customer uses as a reference for support or for his records

target-url.description: The URL of the target service
